predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_adopted_children
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves adopted children.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_descendants_of_adopted_children
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: estate_belongs_to
predicates.description: The estate belongs to the deceased person.

predicates.name: qualifying_descendants_or_adopted_exist
predicates.description: The deceased leaves at least one of: descendants, adopted children, or descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: receives_usufruct_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse receives usufruct over the entire estate as a legal consequence under par. 1.
